title: geofencing — declared entitlements
description: One boolean feature capability + one pool for evaluations. Ref module declares just the feature capability; we add a pool for scaled workloads.

entitlements.description: Geofenced attendance and clock-in gates. Consumers check this before honouring OUTSIDE verdicts.
Monthly cap on evaluate() + healthCheck() calls per tenant. Preflight rejected with HTTP 402 when exhausted. Prevents runaway costs on scaled mobile check-in fleets.
